mapper.select:
select o.id, o.order_no, o.total_amount, o.actual_amount, o.status, o.created_time, od.product_id, p.name product_name, (select pi.url from product_image pi where pi.product_id = p.id order by pi.id limit 1) product_image, od.price, od.quantity, br.score, br.content rating_content from orders o left join order_detail od on o.id = od.order_id left join product p on od.product_id = p.id left join business_rating br on br.product_id = od.product_id and br.order_no = o.order_no
o.business_id = #{businessId} and o.is_delete = 1
and o.status in
#{s}
and o.created_time >= #{dto.startTime}
and o.created_time <= #{dto.endTime}
and o.order_no like concat('%', #{dto.orderNo}, '%')
and p.name like concat('%', #{dto.productName}, '%') collate utf8mb4_general_ci
and exists (select 1 from order_detail od2 where od2.order_id = o.id and od2.product_id = #{dto.productId})
and exists (select 1 from business_rating br2, order_detail od2 where br2.product_id = od2.product_id and br2.order_no = o.order_no and od2.order_id = o.id and br2.score >= #{dto.minScore})
and exists (select 1 from business_rating br2, order_detail od2 where br2.product_id = od2.product_id and br2.order_no = o.order_no and od2.order_id = o.id and br2.score <= #{dto.maxScore})
and exists (select 1 from business_rating br2, order_detail od2 where br2.product_id = od2.product_id and br2.order_no = o.order_no and od2.order_id = o.id)
and not exists (select 1 from business_rating br2, order_detail od2 where br2.product_id = od2.product_id and br2.order_no = o.order_no and od2.order_id = o.id)
order by o.created_time desc
, o.actual_amount ${dto.amountSort}

select o.id, o.order_no, o.total_amount, o.actual_amount, o.status, o.created_time, od.product_id, p.name product_name, (select pi.url from product_image pi where pi.product_id = p.id order by pi.id limit 1) product_image, od.price, od.quantity from orders o left join order_detail od on o.id = od.order_id left join product p on od.product_id = p.id
o.user_id = #{userId} and o.is_delete = 1
and o.status in
#{s}
and o.order_no like concat('%', #{dto.orderNo}, '%')
order by o.created_time desc
, o.actual_amount ${dto.amountSort}

select count(*) from orders o
o.user_id = #{userId} and o.is_delete = 1
and o.status in
#{s}
and o.order_no like concat('%', #{dto.orderNo}, '%')

select sum(case when o.status = 0 then 1 else 0 end) pending_payment, sum(case when o.status = 1 then 1 else 0 end) pending_delivery, sum(case when o.status = 2 then 1 else 0 end) receiving, sum(case when o.status = 3 then 1 else 0 end) completed from orders o where o.user_id = #{userId} and o.is_delete = 1

select o.id, o.order_no, o.total_amount, o.actual_amount, o.status, o.created_time, od.product_id, p.name product_name, (select pi.url from product_image pi where pi.product_id = p.id order by pi.id limit 1) product_image, od.price, od.quantity, case when br.id is not null then 1 else 0 end rated from orders o left join order_detail od on o.id = od.order_id left join product p on od.product_id = p.id left join business_rating br on br.product_id = od.product_id and br.order_no = o.order_no where o.id = #{orderId} and o.user_id = #{userId} and o.is_delete = 1

select o.id order_id, o.order_no, o.total_amount, o.actual_amount, o.status, o.created_time, od.product_id, p.name product_name, (select pi.url from product_image pi where pi.product_id = p.id order by pi.id limit 1) product_image, od.price, od.quantity from orders o left join order_detail od on o.id = od.order_id left join product p on od.product_id = p.id
o.user_id = #{userId} and o.status = 3 and o.is_delete = 1 and not exists ( select 1 from business_rating br where br.product_id = od.product_id and br.user_id = #{userId} )
order by o.created_time desc
